description: Baseline: 0 audit failures, 481 tests across 72 files. Starting deep warcraft-core exploration.

Fixed taskService.update() missing central preparedAt stamping for dispatch_prepared transition. startedAt and completedAt were centrally stamped but preparedAt was only set by dispatch-coordinator via Record<string,unknown> type widening. Any other code path to dispatch_prepared would silently miss the timestamp, breaking stale dispatch detection. Added package regression test + audit test. 484 tests across 73 files.
